specs.Ecosystem Role: Humanoid robot OEM and platform provider
specs.status: Active; raised ~$200M pre-IPO round in 2025

orgInfo.description: Leju (Shenzhen) Robotics is a Chinese humanoid-robotics company best known for its KUAVO general-purpose humanoid line, which became the first humanoid robot running on Huawei HarmonyOS. The company is industrializing humanoid robots for research, service, industrial and educational markets.

_provenance.notes: Founded 2016 in Shenzhen; KUAVO is flagship product.

specs.status: Active; PM01 robot demonstrated world-first humanoid front flip in Feb 2025

orgInfo.description: EngineAI is a Shenzhen-based humanoid-robot startup founded in October 2023 by serial robotics entrepreneur Zhao Tongyang. The company develops full-size and lightweight humanoid platforms (PM01, SE01, T800) emphasizing natural, dynamic, human-like locomotion.

_provenance.notes: Founded October 2023 per Humanoids Daily.

specs.status: Active; K2 Bumblebee entered mass production September 2025

orgInfo.description: Shanghai Kepler Robotics develops hybrid-architecture humanoid robots for industrial automation. Its fifth-generation K2 Bumblebee, priced near $30,000, is positioned as the world's first commercially available hybrid serial-parallel humanoid and entered mass production in 2025.

sources.title: Kepler Robotics showcases K2 Bumblebee at ICRA 2025
Kepler K2 mass production press release

_provenance.notes: Shanghai Kepler Robotics Co., Ltd. Website may also be kepler-robot.com - not WebFetched, listed gotokepler.com used in The Robot Report coverage.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Modular full-size humanoid robot platform developer
specs.status: Active; modular full-size humanoid platform Adam in industrial pilots

orgInfo.description: PNDbotics is a Beijing-based humanoid-robotics company developing modular full-size humanoid platforms - notably the Adam series - using quasi-direct-drive actuators and an open-source SDK. The Adam robot integrates 41 joints and is aimed at industrial, logistics and service applications.

sources.title: Humanoid robot Adam debuts at music festival in China

_provenance.notes: Task spec listed Chinese name 工匠社 - this is INCORRECT. 工匠社 (GJS Robot) is a separate Shenzhen-based entertainment-robot company. PNDbotics' true Chinese company name was not verifiable from open sources; left without Chinese alias rather than fabricate.

specs.status: Active; launched ~US$1,400 family humanoid in 2025

orgInfo.description: Noetix Robotics (松延动力) is a Beijing-based humanoid-robotics startup founded in September 2023 by alumni of Tsinghua University and the Chinese Academy of Sciences. Its Dora and N2 product-grade humanoids target consumer and research markets with agile mobility and rich perception.

_provenance.notes: Founded September 2023 in Beijing.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Humanoid and quadruped robot OEM, dexterous hand maker
specs.status: Active; raised ~$21M angel round; established Wuxi national HQ in 2026

orgInfo.description: MagicLab (魔法原子) is a Chinese robotics company headquartered in Wuxi, Jiangsu, focused on general-purpose humanoid robots, quadrupeds and embodied-intelligence systems. Its flagship MagicBot series demonstrates multi-robot factory collaboration; in February 2025 it introduced the in-house MagicHand S01 dexterous hand.

sources.title: MagicLab Establishes National HQ in Wuxi - Gasgoo

_provenance.notes: Headquartered in Wuxi, NOT Suzhou as task spec stated. Founded 18 Dec 2023.

specs.status: Active; MATRIX-3 launched January 2026, pilot deployments planned mid-2026

orgInfo.description: Matrix Robotics (Shanghai Matrix Superintelligent System Integration Co., Ltd.) was founded in April 2024 by Zhang Haixing, former founding leader of Tesla China's Design and Research Center. The company develops full-size humanoid robots with a founding team from Tesla, Nvidia and OpenAI.

sources.title: Shanghai Securities News: Matrix Robotics Zhang Haixing

_provenance.notes: Founded April 2024.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Humanoid robot OEM with tactile-sensor stack
specs.status: Active; closed Series A in May 2025 led by Fosun RuiZheng

orgInfo.description: Lumos Robot Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. was founded in September 2024 and develops humanoid robots integrating vision and tactile sensing. Its 160 cm LUS2 full-size humanoid and 80 cm NIX companion humanoid target research, education and service markets.

sources.title: Lumos Robot Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. - Baike

_provenance.notes: Also operates Suzhou office; founded 6 Sep 2024.

name: X-Humanoid (北京人形机器人创新中心)
company: X-Humanoid (北京人形机器人创新中心)

specs.Ecosystem Role: National humanoid innovation center; embodied-intelligence platform provider
specs.status: Active; designated National Embodied Intelligence Robot Innovation Center (Oct 2024)

orgInfo.description: Beijing Humanoid Robot Innovation Center Co., Ltd. (北京人形机器人创新中心) was founded in November 2023 in Beijing Yizhuang. It positions itself as China's first full-stack embodied-intelligence hardware-and-software company and develops the Tien Kung humanoid body together with the Wise KaiWu embodied-AI platform.

_provenance.notes: Government-backed innovation center; joint MIIT and Beijing Municipal designation.

specs.status: Active; PHYBOT M1 publicly demoed an airborne backflip in late 2025

orgInfo.description: Beijing Phybot Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in September 2024 by Ren Xiaoyu and Mao Shuhan, former Tsinghua University mechanical-engineering roommates. The startup builds full-size electric humanoid robots; the PHYBOT M1 is a research-grade humanoid claimed to deliver more than 10 kW peak power, and the C1 is a smaller companion humanoid.

_provenance.notes: Official corporate website not independently confirmed via WebFetch; humanoid.guide product profile used as best available source. Founded September 2024.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Commercial service-robot maker expanding into humanoids
specs.status: Active; 80,000+ robots shipped to 60+ countries; D9 humanoid unveiled Dec 2024

orgInfo.description: Pudu Robotics is a Shenzhen-based commercial service-robot leader founded in 2016, known for restaurant and hospitality robots. In 2024 it expanded into embodied humanoids with the D7 semi-humanoid and the full-size bipedal D9, positioning itself for commercially viable embodied intelligence.

sources.title: Pudu Robotics launches PUDU D9 - Robot Report

_provenance.notes: Founded 2016 in Shenzhen.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Collaborative robot leader expanding into humanoids
specs.status: Public (HKEX: 2432); first Chinese cobot maker to IPO (Dec 2024)

orgInfo.description: Shenzhen Yuejiang Technology Co., Ltd. (Dobot) was founded on July 30, 2015 and is one of the world's leading collaborative-robot manufacturers, with 72,000+ robots deployed across 80+ countries. In late 2024 it became the first Chinese cobot company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, and in 2025 it entered the humanoid market with the Atom robot.

sources.title: SCMP: Shenzhen Dobot excites investors with US$27,500 humanoid

_provenance.notes: HKEX listing Dec 2024 raised ~$87M.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Robotic arm and humanoid maker for education, research and industry
specs.status: Active; products sold in 51+ countries

orgInfo.description: Shenzhen Elephant Robotics Technology Co., Ltd. was established in 2016 and designs robotic arms, cobots, robotic pets and the Mercury humanoid series. The Mercury X1 is a 19-DoF wheeled dual-arm humanoid for embodied-intelligence research powered by an NVIDIA Jetson Orin controller.

_provenance.notes: Founded August 2016 in Shenzhen.

specs.status: Active; 7 mass-produced QDD modules shipping, EduLite line forthcoming

orgInfo.description: RobStride Dynamics (灵足时代) was founded in November 2023 in Beijing's Yizhuang International Robot Industry Park and is led by Wang Bo, formerly head of Xiaomi's robotics joint team. It develops QDD integrated joint-actuator modules ranging from 1.5 to 120 N·m used in humanoids, quadrupeds and exoskeletons.

_provenance.notes: Task spec listed Chinese name '魔法师' - actual Chinese name is 灵足时代; not an MIT spinoff.

specs.status: Active; 2025 dexterous-hand deliveries exceeded 10,000 units

orgInfo.description: Beijing Inspire-Robots Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Shijingshan District, Beijing. It produces micro linear servo actuators and the RH56 dexterous-hand series - China's first commercially mass-produced robotic dexterous hand, launched in 2020.

_provenance.notes: Founded 2016 in Beijing.

specs.Ecosystem Role: Multi-dimensional tactile sensor and dexterous-hand maker
specs.status: Active; CES 2026 launch of full-stack 'tactile infrastructure' product matrix

orgInfo.description: PaXini Perception Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2021 and develops the ITPU (Intelligent Tactile Processing Unit) tactile-sensor stack, multi-dimensional 6-axis tactile sensors and the DexH13 dual-modal dexterous hand integrating 1,140 tactile units per hand for embodied-AI applications.

_provenance.notes: Headquartered in Shenzhen, NOT Shanghai as task spec stated.

specs.status: Active; supplier to maker community and small-cobot makers

orgInfo.description: SteadyWin is a Nanchang-based maker of small servo systems and integrated robot joint modules, focused on miniaturization and high efficiency. Its GIM-series planetary-geared brushless actuators are widely used in quadruped robots, exoskeletons and educational humanoids.

_provenance.notes: Exact founding year not on About-Us page; 2020 is an estimate consistent with product release cadence - flagged as uncertain. Operates through Skyline Innovation Co., Limited (China) and Cherrycom Worldwide SL (Spain).

specs.Ecosystem Role: Industrial 3D vision and AI software provider
specs.status: Active; 24,000+ cameras shipped to 50+ countries, raised $155M

orgInfo.description: Mech-Mind Robotics Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 2016 in Beijing by Shao Tianlan and provides industrial 3D cameras and AI-powered vision software for robots. Customers include 100+ Fortune Global 500 companies, with major use in logistics, automotive, home appliances and steel.

_provenance.notes: Founded 2016 in Beijing; backed by IDG Capital, Qiming Venture Partners, Intel Capital.

specs.status: Public (Nasdaq: HSAI); supplies LiDAR for Pony.ai 7th-gen Robotaxi

orgInfo.description: Hesai Group was co-founded in October 2014 by Yifan (David) Li, Kai Sun and Shaoqing Xiang, and is headquartered in Shanghai's Changning District. It is a global leader in 3D LiDAR sensors for ADAS, autonomous driving, robotics and industrial automation, listed on Nasdaq under HSAI since 2023.

_provenance.notes: Founded October 2014; Nasdaq IPO 9 Feb 2023.

specs.status: Active; HAP in serial production for Xpeng and FAW Jiefang since 2021

orgInfo.description: Livox Technology Company Limited was founded in 2016 through DJI's Open Innovation Program and develops cost-effective 3D LiDAR sensors using a rotating-mirror hybrid-solid scanning architecture. Products include the Mid-360 360-degree robotics LiDAR and the automotive-grade HAP.

_provenance.notes: Founded 2016 via DJI Open Innovation Program.

specs.status: Public (SSE STAR Market: 688322); 'China's First 3D Vision Stock' since July 2022

orgInfo.description: Orbbec Inc. was founded in January 2013 and is headquartered in Shenzhen's Nanshan District, with subsidiaries in Foshan, Shanghai, Xi'an and the US. It develops 3D depth cameras using structured-light, stereo-vision and time-of-flight technologies, and listed on the Shanghai STAR Market in July 2022.

sources.title: 3D vision company Orbbec debuts on STAR market - Digitimes

_provenance.notes: Founded January 2013 in Shenzhen; STAR-listed July 2022; backed by Alibaba.
